penalties.description: Task appears to be a tutorial demonstration rather than a timed performance. No clear timing start or completion sequence is visible.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude identified this as a tutorial video with no clear timing markers or completion sequence, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task in 68 seconds. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the task was actually performed versus demonstrated, and Claude's specific observation about lack of timing markers, the more conservative incomplete_task assessment is applied.
